meta.title: Grimaldi Agencies Argentina — Maritime Transport & Logistics
meta.description: Grimaldi Agencies Argentina S.A. represents the Grimaldi Group, an Italian multinational with over 75 years connecting markets through efficient maritime routes.
meta.og_description: Maritime transport and international logistics solutions to and from Argentina.

hero.title: Welcome to Grimaldi Agencies Argentina
hero.subtitle: Connecting markets through efficient and reliable maritime routes, to and from Argentina.

about.title: Effective solutions for your company's needs
about.paragraph_1: Grimaldi Agencies Argentina S.A. represents the prestigious Grimaldi Group in Argentina, an Italian multinational with over 75 years of experience in maritime transport and logistics.
about.paragraph_2: Founded in 1947, the company operates one of the largest fleets in the world, connecting over 150 ports in 50 countries.

services_preview.title: Types of Cargo We Operate
services_preview.card_1_desc: Vehicles and Machinery: Specialized transport for all types of rolling stock.
services_preview.card_2_desc: Equipment and Structures: Solutions for oversized cargo.
services_preview.card_3_desc: 20ft Dry / Tank and 40ft High Cube: Versatile options for your cargo.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers for your daily inquiries
faq.q1: Office location and our business hours
faq.a1: 25 de Mayo 702, 1st Floor, CABA, Monday to Friday from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM.
faq.q2: Where can I find the arrival or departure date of my cargo?
faq.a2_pre: Our schedules are updated every Friday and you can view them by clicking
faq.q3: What documentation must I present for my export?
faq.a3_pre: View all documentation and procedures in detail in our section by clicking
faq.a3_post: or through our official email channels:
faq.q4: Where do I consult the exchange rate for my invoice payment?
faq.a4_pre: You can see it from our web section by clicking
faq.a4_post: or by sending an email requesting the quote to our automatic mailbox:
faq.q5: What services are provided and at which port do you operate?
faq.a5: Our "multipurpose" vessels allow loading containers, project cargo, and automobiles. In Argentina, we operate at Terminal Zárate for its strategic position, connecting with ports in Brazil, Uruguay, Northwest Africa, and Northern Europe, with transshipment possibilities to other routes.
faq.q6: How can I get a quote for cargo?
faq.a6_pre: You can request a quote by sending an email directly to the commercial team corresponding to your type of cargo. The emails are:
faq.q7: How to act in case of a claim for my cargo?
faq.a7_pre: For claims, the following must be submitted:
faq.a7_post: For more information or to send a request, email our official channel:
faq.q8: How to request a cargo inspection?
faq.a8: If a cargo inspection is needed, it must be requested by email to claims@grimaldi-bue.com.ar, bearing in mind that the unit(s) CANNOT be withdrawn from Terminal Zarate until said inspection is carried out.

footer.schedule: Monday to Friday: 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM

services_page.title: Our Logistics Services
services_page.description: We are a maritime agency dedicated to integrated logistics services. We transport vehicles, rolling cargo, containers, and project cargo, connecting Argentina with the world.
services_page.routes_desc_1: Our "multipurpose" vessels are designed for the simultaneous loading of containers, project cargo, and vehicles.
services_page.routes_desc_2: In Argentina, we operate at Zárate Terminal. From there, we connect with key ports in Brazil, Uruguay, Northwest Africa, and Northern Europe, also offering transshipments to extend our routes.
services_page.team_desc: To request a quote, find the contact person or send your inquiry to the email corresponding to your cargo type.
services_page.error_loading: Error loading contacts. Please try reloading the page.

institutional.title: Join Grimaldi Agencies Argentina
institutional.description: We believe our strength lies in the combination of tradition, excellence, and forward-thinking. Learn more about our culture and the opportunities to grow with us.
institutional.mission_text: At Grimaldi Agencies Argentina, we provide reliable and efficient maritime transport solutions in the country, backed by the experience and standards of the Grimaldi Group, an international leader with over 75 years of history.
institutional.vision_text: To be recognized as benchmarks in logistics and maritime transport, combining technology, sustainability, and quality in every operation, to drive trade and sector development.
institutional.why_desc: We are part of the Grimaldi Group, a multinational leader operating since 1947, recognized for its professionalism and innovation. With over 30 years of presence in Argentina, we have consolidated our local leadership operating with international standards.
institutional.career_desc: We currently have the following open positions. Click "See more" to learn the details of each.
institutional.no_vacancies_title: We currently have no active searches.
institutional.no_vacancies_desc: However, if you want to be part of our team, we invite you to send us your CV to be considered for future opportunities.
institutional.hr_desc: To apply for a vacancy or send your CV spontaneously, you can contact our Human Resources department.

documentation.title: Documentation & Procedures Guide
documentation.description: Find model documents, procedure guides, and key contacts for each stage, from expense requests to claims management.
documentation.contact_doc_impo_desc: For inquiries or submissions regarding import documentation, please contact:
documentation.contact_doc_expo_desc: For inquiries or submissions regarding export documentation, please contact:
documentation.contact_equipment_desc: To request an inspection or initiate a damage claim:
documentation.doc_1_desc:
MANDATORY presentation before shipping your merchandise.

Must be submitted IN PERSON at our offices.
documentation.doc_2_desc:
OPTIONAL presentation if you want the BL to be issued at the port of destination.

Send to: doc@grimaldi-bue.com.ar
documentation.doc_3_desc:
OPTIONAL presentation to authorize cargo release without the original BL.

Send to: doc@grimaldi-bue.com.ar
documentation.doc_4_desc:
MANDATORY presentation for all import cargo including CONTAINERS.

Send to: doc@grimaldi-bue.com.ar
documentation.proc_1_desc:
MANDATORY procedure to collect BLs issued at origin.

Must present the corresponding model letter IN PERSON.
documentation.proc_2_desc:
MANDATORY procedure to acquire the ATA signature.

Must present the original BL IN PERSON at our offices.
documentation.proc_3_desc:
Request with **one week anticipation** prior to the vessel's arrival at Zárate.

Specify if you require freight certification and/or BL issuance.

Send to: finance@grimaldi-bue.com.ar
documentation.proc_4_desc:
To initiate a CLAIM, you must present:

  • Letter of protest.
  • Claimed amount.
  • Supporting documentation and photos.

To request an INSPECTION prior to release, contact claims@grimaldi-bue.com.ar.
